status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
official_name: Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions
notes: Federal regulator of banks and insurance companies.

data.notes: Effective 2024. Governs federally regulated financial institutions' outsourcing/third-party arrangements — criticality assessment, concentration risk, contractual clauses, and ongoing monitoring.

match_nodes.description: Technology and Cyber Risk Management Guideline

data.official_name: Guideline B-13: Technology and Cyber Risk Management
data.notes: Effective 2024. Sets expectations for governance, technology resilience, cyber-incident response, and third-party technology risk for federally regulated financial institutions. Complements B-10 and E-21 (Operational Risk).
